authority: brief section 4 Arm M Stage B (mixed tower + Taylor tensor, keystone; CL-M2/CL-M3) + Will's Stage-B GO (Stage A ACCEPTED, #M1 chain pin-consistent)

depends_on.note: bench code pinned in the frozen (post-M1) manifest, enforced by require_frozen (rule 1.9).

organ: IM_b_mixed_tower_v1: lane-certified samples (Stage A composed); exact mixed differences; commutator via ALL distinct axis orderings; Newton tensor inversion (falling factorials expanded exactly per axis).

predictions.PMB.1: mixed tower exactness: every lane-certified sample (reading + D, Stage A's organ composed) equals the independent transformed-tree referee sample exactly in Q, and every mixed difference built from them is exact - on every (fixture, multi-index) of the pinned grids (n=2 AND n=3 scored; anisotropic dyadic steps). Units: (fixture, multi-index).
predictions.PMB.2: the lane-side commutator (K-M2's halt-arm): on every fixture's top mixed order, ALL distinct axis orderings of the iterated difference agree exactly in Q (3 to 90 orderings per fixture incl. the full trivariate (2,2,2) sets); ANY disagreement = K-M2 FIRES (broken lift, the ARM HALTS). Units: cells x orderings.
predictions.PMB.3: THE KEYSTONE - tensor recovery: for every polynomial fixture the Newton tensor inversion recovers the full shifted-monomial coefficient tensor - hence EVERY mixed partial at the base point - exactly in Q, verified three independent ways: (a) step-invariance (a second pinned step ladder recovers the IDENTICAL tensor), (b) the first-order slice equals the independent dual-eval instrument exactly, (c) the hand-pinned tensors (FXMA1, FXMA6) match entry-for-entry. n=2 AND n=3 scored. Units: tensor entries.
predictions.PMB.4: total-degree termination, two-sided at the class boundary: on every polynomial fixture all pinned super-degree mixed differences vanish identically; the pinned at-degree entries are nonzero; and the RATIONAL contrast fixture (FXMA4) does NOT terminate (pinned super-degree diff nonzero) - the certificate withholds correctly outside the polynomial class. Units: multi-indices.
predictions.PMB.5: determinism: battery byte-stable x2 (sha256 over records).

referee: independent transformed-tree exact-Q samples; the dual-eval instrument for the first-order slice; hand-pinned tensors on FXMA1/FXMA6.
status_move_rules: CL-M2 -> DEMONSTRATED iff PMB.1 AND PMB.2 AND PMB.4 PASS. CL-M3 -> DEMONSTRATED iff PMB.3 PASS. **ANY PMB.2 disagreement = K-M2 FIRES: broken lift, the ARM HALTS** - chain preserved verbatim, STOP, route to Will. Any other FAIL: halt-until-fixed.
t2_fence_ack: this stage makes NO G-claims and NO cross-fixture-invariant claims (manifest fence).
